title: Bind sessionNonce to chainId to prevent cross-chain replay

artifacts.description: Add chainId as a public input; change nonceBinding to Poseidon3(nullifierHash, sessionNonce, chainId) instead of Poseidon2
Add chainId as a public input; include chainId in the nullifierHash commitment: Poseidon3(secret, nonce, chainId)
Pass block.chainid as the expected chainId public signal to both verifyProof calls inside verifyHandshake; revert if signal mismatch
Regenerate Solidity verifier from updated HumanUniqueness.zkey after circuit recompile and new trusted setup
Regenerate Solidity verifier (both Groth16 and PLONK variants) from updated AgentPolicy.zkey
Add chainId parameter to proveHandshake and verifyHandshake; pass chainId as public input when generating witness; include in proof inputs object
Extend HandshakeOptions and ProofInputs types to include chainId: bigint
Propagate chainId through the subprocess bridge call; update Python type stubs for HandshakeOptions
Document chainId binding in Section on nonce construction; add cross-chain replay as a named threat in Security Considerations
Add invariant: nonceBinding is chain-specific — two proofs for distinct chainIds sharing the same sessionNonce must not be interchangeable
Add fast witness tests: (a) valid proof with correct chainId passes, (b) proof generated for chainId=1 fails witness check when chainId=137 is substituted
Mirror cross-chain replay rejection tests for AgentPolicy circuit
Integration test: mock proof with mismatched chainId signal causes verifyHandshake to revert; correct chainId passes
Unit test proveHandshake with explicit chainId; assert proof.publicSignals includes chainId at expected index
Update proveHandshake usage example to pass chainId; note that proofs are chain-specific and cannot be reused across deployments

steps: Read current HumanUniqueness.circom and AgentPolicy.circom to confirm existing Poseidon arity and public signal ordering before making changes
Update HumanUniqueness.circom: add `signal input chainId` (public), replace Poseidon2(nullifierHash, sessionNonce) with Poseidon3(nullifierHash, sessionNonce, chainId) for nonceBinding output
Update AgentPolicy.circom: add `signal input chainId` (public), incorporate chainId into the nullifierHash preimage computation
Recompile both circuits with `npm run compile:circuits`; confirm .r1cs constraint counts change by exactly +1 Poseidon3 gate relative to baseline

Re-run trusted setup for HumanUniqueness project-specific key using pot16.ptau (NOTE: HumanUniqueness reuses Semaphore ceremony — verify depth-20 ptau still covers new constraint count before proceeding)
Re-run trusted setup for AgentPolicy Groth16 and PLONK keys using pot16.ptau
Regenerate Solidity verifier contracts from new vkey.json files for HumanUniqueness, AgentPolicy (Groth16), and AgentPolicy (PLONK) using snarkjs exportSolidityVerifier
Update IdentityRegistry.sol verifyHandshake: read block.chainid, pass as expected public signal to both HumanUniquenessVerifier and AgentPolicyVerifier calls; revert on signal mismatch
Update sdk/src/types.ts to add chainId: bigint to HandshakeOptions and ProofInputs
Update sdk/src/handshake.ts proveHandshake to accept chainId and inject into circuit witness inputs; update verifyHandshake to include chainId in expected public signals
Update sdk-python subprocess bridge to forward chainId argument; update Python type stubs
Write and run circuit fast tests for cross-chain replay rejection in HumanUniqueness and AgentPolicy
Write and run Hardhat integration tests for IdentityRegistry.verifyHandshake rejecting wrong-chainId proofs
Write and run SDK unit tests confirming chainId appears at correct index in publicSignals
Update spec/draft-bolyra-mutual-zkp-auth-01.md Security Considerations and circuits/FORMAL-PROPERTIES.md
Run full test suite (npm test) and confirm zero regressions
Run DCO sign-off on all commits (git commit -s)
dependencies: pot16.ptau must accommodate new constraint count for HumanUniqueness (verify 2^16 ceiling still holds after adding Poseidon3 gate)
Semaphore v4 ceremony reuse must be re-validated if HumanUniqueness constraint count crosses a ptau boundary
IdentityRegistry ABI changes require redeployment on Base Sepolia — any existing registered identities will need re-enrollment
SDK semver bump required (breaking change to proveHandshake signature) — coordinate with any downstream integrations (langchain adapter, crewai, mcp-demo)
AgentPolicy PLONK zkey regeneration requires same pot16.ptau as Groth16 variant
